None\n\ndef date_ranges_overlap(start1, end1, start2, end2):\n    return start1 <= end2 and start2 <= end1\n\n# ROUTES IMPLEMENTATION\n\n# 1. Dashboard Page\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef dashboard():\n    vehicles = load_vehicles()\n    featured_vehicles = [v for v in vehicles if v['status'].lower() == 'available']\n    promotions = [\n        \"Save 10% on SUVs this weekend!\",\n        \"Book for 7+ days and get 1 day free!\",\n        \"Free GPS on luxury vehicle rentals\"\n    ]\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', vehicles=featured_vehicles, promotions=promotions, page_title='Car Rental Dashboard')\n\n# 2. Vehicle Search Page\n@app.route('/vehicles/search', methods=['GET'])\ndef vehicle_search():\n    location = request.args.get('location')\n    vehicle_type = request.args.get('vehicle_type')\n    start_date_str = request.args.get('start_date')\n    end_date_str = request.args.get('end_date')\n\n    vehicles = load_vehicles()\n    rentals = load_rentals()\n\n    # Filter available vehicles\n    available_vehicles = [v for v in vehicles if v['status'].lower() == 'available']\n\n    # Filter by location if provided\n    if location:\n        # We assume location filter means pickup_location availability\n        # Here we filter vehicles by those which have rentals with given location or vehicles that are at that location?\n        # Since vehicles.txt does not include location, we interpret location filtering by availability at that location based on rentals.\n        # But without explicit vehicle-location linkage, we skip exact location filter on vehicle here.\n        pass\n\n    # Filter by vehicle_type\n    if vehicle_type:\n        vehicle_type_lower = vehicle_type.lower()\n        available_vehicles = [v for v in available_vehicles if v['vehicle_type'].lower() == vehicle_type_lower]\n\n    # Filter by date range\n    if start_date_str and end_date_str:\n        start_date = parse_date(start_date_str)\n        end_date = parse_date(end_date_str)\n        if not start_date or not end_date or start_date > end_date:\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400\n\n        filtered_vehicles = []\n        for vehicle in available_vehicles:\n            vehicle_id = vehicle['vehicle_id']\n            # Check if vehicle has overlapping rental\n            overlapping = False\n            for rental in rentals:\n                if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:\n                    rental_start = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])\n                    rental_end = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])\n                    if rental_start and rental_end and date_ranges_overlap(start_date, end_date, rental_start, rental_end):\n                        overlapping = True\n                        break\n            if not overlapping:\n                filtered_vehicles.append(vehicle)\n        available_vehicles = filtered_vehicles\n\n    return jsonify(available_vehicles)\n\n# 3. Vehicle Details Page\n@app.route('/vehicles/<int:vehicle_id>')\ndef vehicle_details(vehicle_id):\n    vehicles = load_vehicles()\n    vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)\n    if not vehicle:\n        abort(404, description='Vehicle not found')\n    # No reviews data, so empty or static\n    reviews = []\n    return render_template('vehicle_details.html', vehicle=vehicle, reviews=reviews, page_title='Vehicle Details')\n\n# 4. Booking Page\n@app.route('/booking', methods=['POST'])\ndef booking():\n    data = request.get_json()\n    required_fields = ['vehicle_id', 'pickup_location', 'dropoff_location', 'pickup_date', 'dropoff_date', 'customer_id']\n    if not data or not all(field in data for field in required_fields):\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required fields'}), 400\n\n    vehicle_id = data['vehicle_id']\n    pickup_location = data['pickup_location']\n    dropoff_location = data['dropoff_location']\n    pickup_date = parse_date(data['pickup_date'])\n    dropoff_date = parse_date(data['dropoff_date'])\n    customer_id = data['customer_id']\n\n    if not pickup_date or not dropoff_date or pickup_date > dropoff_date:\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400\n\n    # Check vehicle availability\n    rentals = load_rentals()\n    for rental in rentals:\n        if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:\n            rental_pickup = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])\n            rental_dropoff = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])\n            if date_ranges_overlap(pickup_date, dropoff_date, rental_pickup, rental_dropoff):\n                return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available for the selected dates'}), 400\n\n    vehicles = load_vehicles()\n    vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)\n    if not vehicle or vehicle['status'].lower() != 'available':\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available'}), 400\n\n    # Calculate total price\n    days = (dropoff_date - pickup_date).days + 1\n    total_price = vehicle['daily_rate'] * days\n\n    # Here store temporary booking? Spec only says \"store temporary or return price for confirmation\" -\n    # We'll just return the price for confirmation in response.\n\n    return jsonify({'total_price': round(total_price, 2)})\n\n# 5. Insurance Options Page\n@app.route('/insurance', methods=['GET'])\ndef insurance_options():\n    insurance_plans = load_insurance()\n    return render_template('insurance.html', insurance_plans=insurance_plans, page_title='Select Insurance Coverage')\n\n# 6. Confirm Booking with Insurance\n@app.route('/booking/confirm', methods=['POST'])\ndef booking_confirm():\n    data = request.get_json()\n    required_fields = ['vehicle_id', 'customer_id', 'pickup_location', 'dropoff_location', 'pickup_date', 'dropoff_date', 'insurance_id']\n    if not data or not all(field in data for field in required_fields):\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required fields'}), 400\n\n    vehicle_id = data['vehicle_id']\n    customer_id = data['customer_id']\n    pickup_location = data['pickup_location']\n    dropoff_location = data['dropoff_location']\n    pickup_date = parse_date(data['pickup_date'])\n    dropoff_date = parse_date(data['dropoff_date'])\n    insurance_id = data['insurance_id']\n    special_requests = data.get('special_requests', '')\n\n    if not pickup_date or not dropoff_date or pickup_date > dropoff_date:\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400\n\n    vehicles = load_vehicles()\n    vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)\n    if not vehicle or vehicle['status'].lower() != 'available':\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available'}), 400\n\n    insurance_plans = load_insurance()\n    insurance_plan = next((i for i in insurance_plans if i['insurance_id'] == insurance_id), None)\n    if not insurance_plan:\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid insurance plan'}), 400\n\n    rentals = load_rentals()\n    for rental in rentals:\n        if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:\n            rental_pickup = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])\n            rental_dropoff = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])\n            if date_ranges_overlap(pickup_date, dropoff_date, rental_pickup, rental_dropoff):\n                return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available for the selected dates'}), 400\n\n    # Generate new rental_id and reservation_id\n    new_rental_id = 1\n    new_reservation_id = 1\n    if rentals:\n        new_rental_id = max(r['rental_id'] for r in rentals) + 1\n    reservations = load_reservations()\n    if reservations:\n        new_reservation_id = max(r['reservation_id'] for r in reservations) + 1\n\n    days = (dropoff_date - pickup_date).days + 1\n    total_price = vehicle['daily_rate'] * days + insurance_plan['daily_cost'] * days\n\n    # Save new rental record\n    new_rental = {\n        'rental_id': new_rental_id,\n        'vehicle_id': vehicle_id,\n        'customer_id': customer_id,\n        'pickup_date': pickup_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),\n        'dropoff_date': dropoff_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),\n        'pickup_location': pickup_location,\n        'dropoff_location': dropoff_location,\n        'total_price': total_price,\n        'status': 'Active'\n    }\n    rentals.append(new_rental)\n    save_rentals(rentals)\n\n    # Save new reservation record\n    new_reservation = {\n        'reservation_id': new_reservation_id,\n        'rental_id': new_rental_id,\n        'vehicle_id': vehicle_id,\n        'customer_id': customer_id,\n        'status': 'Confirmed',\n        'insurance_id': insurance_id,\n        'special_requests': special_requests\n    }\n    reservations.append(new_reservation)\n    save_reservations(reservations)\n\n    return jsonify({'message': 'Booking confirmed', 'rental_id': new_rental_id, 'reservation_id': new_reservation_id, 'total_price': round(total_price, 2)})\n\n# 7. Rental History Page\n@app.route('/rentals/history', methods=['GET'])\ndef rental_history():\n    customer_id = request.args.get('customer_id', type=int)\n    status_filter = request.args.get('status', 'All').lower()\n\n    rentals = load_rentals()\n    filtered = []\n\n    for rental in rentals:\n        if customer_id and rental['customer_id'] != customer_id:\n            continue\n        if status_filter != 'all':\n            if rental['status'].lower() != status_filter:\n                continue\n        filtered.append(rental)\n\n    return render_template('rental_history.html', rentals=filtered, page_title='Rental History')\n\n# 8. Reservation Management Page\n@app.route('/reservations', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef reservations_page():\n    if request.method == 'GET':\n        customer_id = request.args.get('customer_id', type=int)\n        reservations = load_reservations()\n        if customer_id:\n            reservations = [r for r in reservations if r['customer_id'] == customer_id]\n        # Return current and upcoming only\n        # Assuming upcoming means status not Cancelled\n        reservations = [r for r in reservations if r['status'].lower() != 'cancelled']\n        return render_template('reservations.html', reservations=reservations, page_title='My Reservations')\n    elif request.method == 'POST':\n        # Create new reservation? Spec does not detail POST to /reservations\n        # We can implement basic creation if needed, but spec unclear, so reject\n        return jsonify({'error': 'POST method to /reservations not supported'}), 405\n\n@app.route('/reservations/<int:reservation_id>', methods=['PUT', 'DELETE'])\ndef reservation_modify_cancel(reservation_id):\n    reservations = load_reservations()\n    rentals = load_rentals()\n    reservation = next((r for r in reservations if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id), None)\n    if not reservation:\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Reservation not found'}), 404\n\n    if request.method == 'PUT':\n        data = request.get_json()\n        if not data:\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing data'}), 400\n\n        # Update details or cancel\n        # Allow changing status or special_requests\n        status = data.get('status')\n        special_requests = data.get('special_requests')\n\n        if status:\n            reservation['status'] = status\n        if special_requests is not None:\n            reservation['special_requests'] = special_requests\n\n        # Save back\n        save_reservations(reservations)\n        return jsonify({'message': 'Reservation updated'})\n\n    elif request.method == 'DELETE':\n        # Cancel reservation and associated rental\n        reservation['status'] = 'Cancelled'\n        rental = next((r for r in rentals if r['rental_id'] == reservation['rental_id']), None)\n        if rental:\n            rental['status'] = 'Cancelled'\n        save_reservations(reservations)\n        save_rentals(rentals)\n        return jsonify({'message': 'Reservation and rental cancelled'})\n\n# 9. Special Requests Page\n@app.route('/reservations/<int:reservation_id>/special_requests', methods=['POST'])\ndef special_requests(reservation_id):\n    data = request.get_json()\n    if not data:\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing request data'}), 400\n\n    driver_assistance = data.get('driver_assistance', False)\n    gps = data.get('gps', False)\n    child_seat_quantity = data.get('child_seat_quantity', 0)\n    special_notes = data.get('special_notes', '')\n\n    reservations = load_reservations()\n    reservation = next((r for r in reservations if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id), None)\n    if not reservation:\n        return jsonify({'error': 'Reservation not found'}), 404\n\n    # Compose new special_requests string\n    parts = []\n    if driver_assistance:\n        parts.append('Driver assistance requested')\n    if gps:\n        parts.append('GPS requested')\n    if child_seat_quantity and int(child_seat_quantity) > 0:\n        parts.append(f'Child seat(s) quantity: {int(child_seat_quantity)}')\n    if special_notes:\n        parts.append(f'Notes: {special_notes}')\n\n    reservation['special_requests'] = '; '.join(parts)\n    save_reservations(reservations)\n\n    return jsonify({'message': 'Special requests updated'})\n\n# 10. Locations Page\n@app.route('/locations', methods=['GET'])\ndef locations_page():\n    hours_filter = request.args.get('hours')\n    search = request.args.get('search')\n\n    locations = load_locations()\n\n    filtered = locations\n\n    if hours_filter:\n        # Possible hours_filter values: exact match or partial match\n        filtered = [loc for loc in filtered if hours_filter in loc['hours']]\n\n    if search:\n        search_lower = search.lower()\n        filtered = [loc for loc in filtered if search_lower in loc['city'].lower() or search_lower in loc['address'].lower()]\n\n    return render_template('locations.html', locations=filtered, page_title='Pickup and Dropoff Locations')\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)\n"})

line.split('|')                     rental = {                         'rental_id': int(parts[0]),                         'vehicle_id': int(parts[1]),                         'customer_id': int(parts[2]),                         'pickup_date': parts[3],                         'dropoff_date': parts[4],                         'pickup_location': parts[5],                         'dropoff_location': parts[6],                         'total_price': float(parts[7]),                         'status': parts[8]                     }                     rentals.append(rental)     except FileNotFoundError:         pass     return rentals   def save_rentals(rentals):     with open(get_file_path('rentals.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for r in rentals:             line = f"{r['rental_id']}|{r['vehicle_id']}|{r['customer_id']}|{r['pickup_date']}|{r['dropoff_date']}|{r['pickup_location']}|{r['dropoff_location']}|{r['total_price']:.2f}|{r['status']}"             f.write(line + '\n')   def load_insurance():     insurance_plans = []     try:         with open(get_file_path('insurance.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line = line.strip()                 if line:                     parts = line.split('|')                     plan = {                         'insurance_id': int(parts[0]),                         'plan_name': parts[1],                         'description': parts[2],                         'daily_cost': float(parts[3]),                         'coverage_limit': parts[4],                         'deductible': float(parts[5])                     }                     insurance_plans.append(plan)     except FileNotFoundError:         pass     return insurance_plans   def save_insurance(plans):     with open(get_file_path('insurance.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for p in plans:             line = f"{p['insurance_id']}|{p['plan_name']}|{p['description']}|{p['daily_cost']:.2f}|{p['coverage_limit']}|{p['deductible']:.2f}"             f.write(line + '\n')   def load_reservations():     reservations = []     try:         with open(get_file_path('reservations.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:             for line in f:                 line = line.strip()                 if line:                     parts = line.split('|')                     reservation = {                         'reservation_id': int(parts[0]),                         'rental_id': int(parts[1]),                         'vehicle_id': int(parts[2]),                         'customer_id': int(parts[3]),                         'status': parts[4],                         'insurance_id': int(parts[5]),                         'special_requests': parts[6] if len(parts) > 6 else ''                     }                     reservations.append(reservation)     except FileNotFoundError:         pass     return reservations   def save_reservations(reservations):     with open(get_file_path('reservations.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:         for res in reservations:             line = f"{res['reservation_id']}|{res['rental_id']}|{res['vehicle_id']}|{res['customer_id']}|{res['status']}|{res['insurance_id']}|{res['special_requests']}"             f.write(line + '\n')  # Helper date functions  def parse_date(date_str):     try:         return datetime.strptime(date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()     except Exception:         return None  def date_ranges_overlap(start1, end1, start2, end2):     return start1 <= end2 and start2 <= end1  # ROUTES IMPLEMENTATION  # 1. Dashboard Page @app.route('/dashboard') def dashboard():     vehicles = load_vehicles()     featured_vehicles = [v for v in vehicles if v['status'].lower() == 'available']     promotions = [         "Save 10% on SUVs this weekend!",         "Book for 7+ days and get 1 day free!",         "Free GPS on luxury vehicle rentals"     ]     return render_template('dashboard.html', vehicles=featured_vehicles, promotions=promotions, page_title='Car Rental Dashboard')  # 2. Vehicle Search Page @app.route('/vehicles/search', methods=['GET']) def vehicle_search():     location = request.args.get('location')     vehicle_type = request.args.get('vehicle_type')     start_date_str = request.args.get('start_date')     end_date_str = request.args.get('end_date')      vehicles = load_vehicles()     rentals = load_rentals()      # Filter available vehicles     available_vehicles = [v for v in vehicles if v['status'].lower() == 'available']      # Filter by location if provided     if location:         # We assume location filter means pickup_location availability         # Here we filter vehicles by those which have rentals with given location or vehicles that are at that location?         # Since vehicles.txt does not include location, we interpret location filtering by availability at that location based on rentals.         # But without explicit vehicle-location linkage, we skip exact location filter on vehicle here.         pass      # Filter by vehicle_type     if vehicle_type:         vehicle_type_lower = vehicle_type.lower()         available_vehicles = [v for v in available_vehicles if v['vehicle_type'].lower() == vehicle_type_lower]      # Filter by date range     if start_date_str and end_date_str:         start_date = parse_date(start_date_str)         end_date = parse_date(end_date_str)         if not start_date or not end_date or start_date > end_date:             return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400          filtered_vehicles = []         for vehicle in available_vehicles:             vehicle_id = vehicle['vehicle_id']             # Check if vehicle has overlapping rental             overlapping = False             for rental in rentals:                 if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:                     rental_start = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])                     rental_end = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])                     if rental_start and rental_end and date_ranges_overlap(start_date, end_date, rental_start, rental_end):                         overlapping = True                         break             if not overlapping:                 filtered_vehicles.append(vehicle)         available_vehicles = filtered_vehicles      return jsonify(available_vehicles)  # 3. Vehicle Details Page @app.route('/vehicles/<int:vehicle_id>') def vehicle_details(vehicle_id):     vehicles = load_vehicles()     vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)     if not vehicle:         abort(404, description='Vehicle not found')     # No reviews data, so empty or static     reviews = []     return render_template('vehicle_details.html', vehicle=vehicle, reviews=reviews, page_title='Vehicle Details')  # 4. Booking Page @app.route('/booking', methods=['POST']) def booking():     data = request.get_json()     required_fields = ['vehicle_id', 'pickup_location', 'dropoff_location', 'pickup_date', 'dropoff_date', 'customer_id']     if not data or not all(field in data for field in required_fields):         return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required fields'}), 400      vehicle_id = data['vehicle_id']     pickup_location = data['pickup_location']     dropoff_location = data['dropoff_location']     pickup_date = parse_date(data['pickup_date'])     dropoff_date = parse_date(data['dropoff_date'])     customer_id = data['customer_id']      if not pickup_date or not dropoff_date or pickup_date > dropoff_date:         return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400      # Check vehicle availability     rentals = load_rentals()     for rental in rentals:         if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:             rental_pickup = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])             rental_dropoff = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])             if date_ranges_overlap(pickup_date, dropoff_date, rental_pickup, rental_dropoff):                 return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available for the selected dates'}), 400      vehicles = load_vehicles()     vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)     if not vehicle or vehicle['status'].lower() != 'available':         return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available'}), 400      # Calculate total price     days = (dropoff_date - pickup_date).days + 1     total_price = vehicle['daily_rate'] * days      # Here store temporary booking? Spec only says "store temporary or return price for confirmation" -     # We'll just return the price for confirmation in response.      return jsonify({'total_price': round(total_price, 2)})  # 5. Insurance Options Page @app.route('/insurance', methods=['GET']) def insurance_options():     insurance_plans = load_insurance()     return render_template('insurance.html', insurance_plans=insurance_plans, page_title='Select Insurance Coverage')  # 6. Confirm Booking with Insurance @app.route('/booking/confirm', methods=['POST']) def booking_confirm():     data = request.get_json()     required_fields = ['vehicle_id', 'customer_id', 'pickup_location', 'dropoff_location', 'pickup_date', 'dropoff_date', 'insurance_id']     if not data or not all(field in data for field in required_fields):         return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required fields'}), 400      vehicle_id = data['vehicle_id']     customer_id = data['customer_id']     pickup_location = data['pickup_location']     dropoff_location = data['dropoff_location']     pickup_date = parse_date(data['pickup_date'])     dropoff_date = parse_date(data['dropoff_date'])     insurance_id = data['insurance_id']     special_requests = data.get('special_requests', '')      if not pickup_date or not dropoff_date or pickup_date > dropoff_date:         return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400      vehicles = load_vehicles()     vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)     if not vehicle or vehicle['status'].lower() != 'available':         return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available'}), 400      insurance_plans = load_insurance()     insurance_plan = next((i for i in insurance_plans if i['insurance_id'] == insurance_id), None)     if not insurance_plan:         return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid insurance plan'}), 400      rentals = load_rentals()     for rental in rentals:         if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:             rental_pickup = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])             rental_dropoff = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])             if date_ranges_overlap(pickup_date, dropoff_date, rental_pickup, rental_dropoff):                 return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available for the selected dates'}), 400      # Generate new rental_id and reservation_id     new_rental_id = 1     new_reservation_id = 1     if rentals:         new_rental_id = max(r['rental_id'] for r in rentals) + 1     reservations = load_reservations()     if reservations:         new_reservation_id = max(r['reservation_id'] for r in reservations) + 1      days = (dropoff_date - pickup_date).days + 1     total_price = vehicle['daily_rate'] * days + insurance_plan['daily_cost'] * days      # Save new rental record     new_rental = {         'rental_id': new_rental_id,         'vehicle_id': vehicle_id,         'customer_id': customer_id,         'pickup_date': pickup_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),         'dropoff_date': dropoff_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),         'pickup_location': pickup_location,         'dropoff_location': dropoff_location,         'total_price': total_price,         'status': 'Active'     }     rentals.append(new_rental)     save_rentals(rentals)      # Save new reservation record     new_reservation = {         'reservation_id': new_reservation_id,         'rental_id': new_rental_id,         'vehicle_id': vehicle_id,         'customer_id': customer_id,         'status': 'Confirmed',         'insurance_id': insurance_id,         'special_requests': special_requests     }     reservations.append(new_reservation)     save_reservations(reservations)      return jsonify({'message': 'Booking confirmed', 'rental_id': new_rental_id, 'reservation_id': new_reservation_id, 'total_price': round(total_price, 2)})  # 7. Rental History Page @app.route('/rentals/history', methods=['GET']) def rental_history():     customer_id = request.args.get('customer_id', type=int)     status_filter = request.args.get('status', 'All').lower()      rentals = load_rentals()     filtered = []      for rental in rentals:         if customer_id and rental['customer_id'] != customer_id:             continue         if status_filter != 'all':             if rental['status'].lower() != status_filter:                 continue         filtered.append(rental)      return render_template('rental_history.html', rentals=filtered, page_title='Rental History')  # 8. Reservation Management Page @app.route('/reservations', methods=['GET', 'POST']) def reservations_page():     if request.method == 'GET':         customer_id = request.args.get('customer_id', type=int)         reservations = load_reservations()         if customer_id:             reservations = [r for r in reservations if r['customer_id'] == customer_id]         # Return current and upcoming only         # Assuming upcoming means status not Cancelled         reservations = [r for r in reservations if r['status'].lower() != 'cancelled']         return render_template('reservations.html', reservations=reservations, page_title='My Reservations')     elif request.method == 'POST':         # Create new reservation? Spec does not detail POST to /reservations         # We can implement basic creation if needed, but spec unclear, so reject         return jsonify({'error': 'POST method to /reservations not supported'}), 405  @app.route('/reservations/<int:reservation_id>', methods=['PUT', 'DELETE']) def reservation_modify_cancel(reservation_id):     reservations = load_reservations()     rentals = load_rentals()     reservation = next((r for r in reservations if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id), None)     if not reservation:         return jsonify({'error': 'Reservation not found'}), 404      if request.method == 'PUT':         data = request.get_json()         if not data:             return jsonify({'error': 'Missing data'}), 400          # Update details or cancel         # Allow changing status or special_requests         status = data.get('status')         special_requests = data.get('special_requests')          if status:             reservation['status'] = status         if special_requests is not None:             reservation['special_requests'] = special_requests          # Save back         save_reservations(reservations)         return jsonify({'message': 'Reservation updated'})      elif request.method == 'DELETE':         # Cancel reservation and associated rental         reservation['status'] = 'Cancelled'         rental = next((r for r in rentals if r['rental_id'] == reservation['rental_id']), None)         if rental:             rental['status'] = 'Cancelled'         save_reservations(reservations)         save_rentals(rentals)         return jsonify({'message': 'Reservation and rental cancelled'})  # 9. Special Requests Page @app.route('/reservations/<int:reservation_id>/special_requests', methods=['POST']) def special_requests(reservation_id):     data = request.get_json()     if not data:         return jsonify({'error': 'Missing request data'}), 400      driver_assistance = data.get('driver_assistance', False)     gps = data.get('gps', False)     child_seat_quantity = data.get('child_seat_quantity', 0)     special_notes = data.get('special_notes', '')      reservations = load_reservations()     reservation = next((r for r in reservations if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id), None)     if not reservation:         return jsonify({'error': 'Reservation not found'}), 404      # Compose new special_requests string     parts = []     if driver_assistance:         parts.append('Driver assistance requested')     if gps:         parts.append('GPS requested')     if child_seat_quantity and int(child_seat_quantity) > 0:         parts.append(f'Child seat(s) quantity: {int(child_seat_quantity)}')     if special_notes:         parts.append(f'Notes: {special_notes}')      reservation['special_requests'] = '; '.join(parts)     save_reservations(reservations)      return jsonify({'message': 'Special requests updated'})  # 10. Locations Page @app.route('/locations', methods=['GET']) def locations_page():     hours_filter = request.args.get('hours')     search = request.args.get('search')      locations = load_locations()      filtered = locations      if hours_filter:         # Possible hours_filter values: exact match or partial match         filtered = [loc for loc in filtered if hours_filter in loc['hours']]      if search:         search_lower = search.lower()         filtered = [loc for loc in filtered if search_lower in loc['city'].lower() or search_lower in loc['address'].lower()]      return render_template('locations.html', locations=filtered, page_title='Pickup and Dropoff Locations')   if __name__ == '__main__':     app.run(debug=True)
  [design_spec.md] # CarRental Design Specification  ---  ## Section 1: Backend Routes and Data Schemas  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Route:** `/dashboard` - **Methods:** GET - **Description:** Fetch featured vehicles (status="Available") from `vehicles.txt` and display current promotions. - **Request Parameters:** None  ---  ### 2. Vehicle Search Page - **Route:** `/vehicles/search` - **Methods:** GET - **Query Parameters:**    - `location` (optional)   - `vehicle_type` (optional)   - `start_date` (optional)   - `end_date` (optional) - **Description:** Load available vehicles from `vehicles.txt` (status="Available"), filter by vehicle type and location, filter based on rental date range by checking overlapping bookings in `rentals.txt`. - **Response:** Filtered vehicle data.  ---  ### 3. Vehicle Details Page - **Route:** `/vehicles/<int:vehicle_id>` - **Methods:** GET - **Description:** Retrieve vehicle details by `vehicle_id` from `vehicles.txt` including specs (make, model, seats, transmission, fuel type, daily rate). Reviews section can be static or empty.  ---  ### 4. Booking Page - **Route:** `/booking` - **Methods:** POST - **Request Body (JSON):**   - `vehicle_id` (int)   - `pickup_location` (str)   - `dropoff_location` (str)   - `pickup_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)   - `dropoff_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)   - `customer_id` (int) - **Business Logic:** Validate vehicle availability from `rentals.txt` within date range, calculate total price (daily_rate * number of days), store temporary booking or return price for confirmation.  ---  ### 5. Insurance Options Page - **Route:** `/insurance` - **Methods:** GET - **Description:** Fetch insurance plans from `insurance.txt`. Return plan details: name, description, daily cost, coverage limit, deductible.  ---  ### 6. Confirm Booking with Insurance - **Route:** `/booking/confirm` - **Methods:** POST - **Request Body (JSON):**   - `vehicle_id` (int)   - `customer_id` (int)   - `pickup_location` (str)   - `dropoff_location` (str)   - `pickup_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)   - `dropoff_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)   - `insurance_id` (int)   - `special_requests` (str, optional) - **Business Logic:** Generate new `rental_id` and `reservation_id` by incrementing max existing IDs. Calculate total price as vehicle daily_rate * days + insurance daily_cost * days. Save new rental record with "Active" status to `rentals.txt`. Save reservation including special requests to `reservations.txt`.  ---  ### 7. Rental History Page - **Route:** `/rentals/history` - **Methods:** GET - **Query Parameters:**   - `customer_id` (optional)   - `status` (optional; values: All, Active, Completed, Cancelled) - **Description:** Load `rentals.txt` filtered by customer and status. Return rental history list.  ---  ### 8. Reservation Management Page - **Route:** `/reservations` - **Methods:** GET, POST, PUT, DELETE - **GET:**   - Query Parameter: `customer_id` (optional)   - Returns current and upcoming reservations from `reservations.txt`, filtered if customer provided. - **PUT:** `/reservations/<int:reservation_id>`   - Modify reservation details or cancel; update in `reservations.txt`. - **DELETE:** `/reservations/<int:reservation_id>`   - Cancel reservation; update statuses to "Cancelled" in both reservations and rentals files.  ---  ### 9. Special Requests Page - **Route:** `/reservations/<int:reservation_id>/special_requests` - **Methods:** POST - **Request Body (JSON):** Contains special request fields: driver assistance, GPS, child seat quantity, special notes. - **Description:** Append or update `special_requests` field in `reservations.txt` for the reservation.  ---  ### 10. Locations Page - **Route:** `/locations` - **Methods:** GET - **Query Parameters:**   - `hours` (optional)   - `search` (optional) - **Description:** Load locations from `locations.txt`, filter by operating hours and search by city or name. Return location list.  ---  ## Section 2: Data File Schemas and Formats  ### 1. vehicles.txt - **Fields:** vehicle_id (int), make (str), model (str), vehicle_type (str), daily_rate (float), seats (int), transmission (str), fuel_type (str), status (str) - **Delimiter:** `|` - **Example:** ``` 1|Toyota|Camry|Sedan|55.00|5|Automatic|Petrol|Available 2|Honda|CR-V|SUV|75.00|7|Automatic|Petrol|Available 3|BMW|X5|Luxury|150.00|5|Automatic|Diesel|Available ```  ---  ### 2. customers.txt - **Fields:** customer_id (int), name (str), email (str), phone (str), driver_license (str), license_expiry (date `YYYY-MM-DD`) - **Delimiter:** `|` - **Example:** ``` 1|Alice Johnson|alice@example.com|555-0101|D1234567|2026-06-15 2|Bob Williams|bob@example.com|555-0102|D2345678|2027-03-20 ```  ---  ### 3. locations.txt - **Fields:** location_id (int), city (str), address (str), phone (str), hours (str), available_vehicles (int) - **Delimiter:** `|` - **Example:** ``` 1|New York|123 Main St, NYC|555-1000|24/7|12 2|Los Angeles|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-2000|09:00-18:00|8 ```  ---  ### 4. rentals.txt - **Fields:** rental_id (int), vehicle_id (int), customer_id (int), pickup_date (date `YYYY-MM-DD`), dropoff_date (date `YYYY-MM-DD`), pickup_location (str), dropoff_location (str), total_price (float), status (str) - **Delimiter:** `|` - **Example:** ``` 1|1|1|2025-02-01|2025-02-05|New York|Los Angeles|275.00|Completed 2|2|2|2025-02-10|2025-02-12|Los Angeles|New York|150.00|Active ```  ---  ### 5. insurance.txt - **Fields:** insurance_id (int), plan_name (str), description (str), daily_cost (float), coverage_limit (str or float), deductible (float) - **Delimiter:** `|` - **Example:** ``` 1|Basic Coverage|Liability only, min coverage|5.00|50000|1000 2|Standard Coverage|Collision and theft protection|12.00|250000|500 3|Premium Coverage|Full comprehensive protection|18.00|Unlimited|0 ```  ---  ### 6. reservations.txt - **Fields:** reservation_id (int), rental_id (int), vehicle_id (int), customer_id (int), status (str), insurance_id (int), special_requests (str) - **Delimiter:** `|` - **Example:** ``` 1|1|1|1|Confirmed|2|Driver assistance requested 2|2|2|2|Active|1|GPS and child seat needed ```  ---  ## Section 3: Frontend Templates and Navigation  ### 1. Dashboard Page - **Template Filename:** dashboard.html - **Page Title:** Car Rental Dashboard - **Elements:**   - `dashboard-page` (Div): Main container   - `featured-vehicles` (Div): Featured vehicle recommendations display   - `search-vehicles-button` (Button): Navigate to Vehicle Search page   - `my-reservations-button` (Button): Navigate to Reservations page   - `promotions-section` (Div): Current promotions display  ---  ### 2. Vehicle Search Page - **Template Filename:** vehicle_search.html - **Page Title:** Search Vehicles - **Elements:**   - `search-page` (Div): Main container   - `location-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by pickup location   - `vehicle-type-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by vehicle type [Economy, Compact, Sedan, SUV, Luxury]   - `date-range-input` (Input): Rental date range input   - `vehicles-grid` (Div): Grid displaying vehicle cards     - Each vehicle card includes:       - Vehicle image (img tag, Jinja for loop used, no fixed id)       - Model and price per day       - `view-details-button-{vehicle_id}` (Button): View vehicle details  ---  ### 3. Vehicle Details Page - **Template Filename:** vehicle_details.html - **Page Title:** Vehicle Details - **Elements:**   - `vehicle-details-page` (Div): Container for details page   - `vehicle-name` (H1): Vehicle make and model display   - `vehicle-specs` (Div): Vehicle specifications (engine, seats, transmission)   - `daily-rate` (Div): Daily rental rate   - `book-now-button` (Button): Initiate booking process   - `vehicle-reviews` (Div): Customer reviews section  ---  ### 4. Booking Page - **Template Filename:** booking.html - **Page Title:** Book Your Rental - **Elements:**   - `booking-page` (Div): Container   - `pickup-location` (Dropdown): Pickup location selection   - `dropoff-location` (Dropdown): Dropoff location selection   - `pickup-date` (Input): Pickup date selector   - `dropoff-date` (Input): Dropoff date selector   - `calculate-price-button` (Button): Compute total rental price   - `total-price` (Div): Display total price   - `proceed-to-insurance-button` (Button): Proceed to Insurance Options page  ---  ### 5. Insurance Options Page - **Template Filename:** insurance.html - **Page Title:** Select Insurance Coverage - **Elements:**   - `insurance-page` (Div): Container   - `insurance-options` (Div): Insurance plans display     - Each plan includes:       - `select-insurance-{insurance_id}` (Radio): Select insurance radio button   - `insurance-description` (Div): Description of selected plan   - `insurance-price` (Div): Price of selected insurance   - `confirm-booking-button` (Button): Confirm booking with insurance  ---  ### 6. Rental History Page - **Template Filename:** rental_history.html - **Page Title:** Rental History - **Elements:**   - `history-page` (Div): Container   - `rentals-table` (Table): Rental details table (ID, vehicle, dates, location, status)   - `view-rental-details-{rental_id}` (Button): View rental details   - `status-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by rental status   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate to Dashboard page  ---  ### 7. Reservation Management Page - **Template Filename:** reservations.html - **Page Title:** My Reservations - **Elements:**   - `reservations-page` (Div): Container   - `reservations-list` (Div): List of reservations     - Each reservation item includes:       - `modify-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (Button): Modify reservation       - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (Button): Cancel reservation   - `sort-by-date-button` (Button): Sort reservations   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate to Dashboard  ---  ### 8. Special Requests Page - **Template Filename:** special_requests.html - **Page Title:** Special Requests - **Elements:**   - `requests-page` (Div): Container   - `select-reservation` (Dropdown): Select reservation for requests   - `driver-assistance-checkbox` (Checkbox): Driver assistance request   - `gps-option-checkbox` (Checkbox): GPS option   - `child-seat-quantity` (Input): Number of child seats   - `special-notes` (Textarea): Additional notes   - `submit-requests-button` (Button): Submit requests  ---  ### 9. Locations Page - **Template Filename:** locations.html - **Page Title:** Pickup and Dropoff Locations - **Elements:**   - `locations-page` (Div): Container   - `locations-list` (Div): List of locations     - Each location item has:       - `location-detail-button-{location_id}` (Button): View location details   - `hours-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by operating hours   - `search-location-input` (Input): Search by city or name   - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate to Dashboard  ---  ## Section 4: Navigation and Interaction  ### Navigation Flows - Dashboard page buttons:   - `search-vehicles-button` -> Vehicle Search Page   - `my-reservations-button` -> Reservations Page   - `back-to-dashboard` (where present) -> Dashboard Page - Vehicle Search:   - `view-details-button-{vehicle_id}` -> Vehicle Details Page - Vehicle Details:   - `book-now-button` -> Booking Page with vehicle context - Booking:   - `calculate-price-button` -> Compute and show price   - `proceed-to-insurance-button` -> Insurance Options Page - Insurance Options:   - `confirm-booking-button` -> Confirm booking and navigate to Rental History or Reservations - Rental History:   - `view-rental-details-{rental_id}` -> Show rental details   - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard - Reservations:   - `modify-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` -> Modify reservation   - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` -> Cancel reservation   - `sort-by-date-button` -> Sort reservations   - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard - Special Requests:   - `submit-requests-button` -> Submit and confirm requests - Locations:   - `location-detail-button-{location_id}` -> Show location details   - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard  ---  ### Dynamic Data Placeholders (Jinja2 Variable Usage) - Vehicles lists: `{% for vehicle in vehicles %}`, vehicle attributes via `vehicle.id`, `vehicle.make`, `vehicle.model`, `vehicle.daily_rate`. - Locations: `{% for location in locations %}` - Reservations and Rentals: `{% for reservation in reservations %}` or `{% for rental in rentals %}` - Insurance options: `{% for plan in insurance_plans %}` - Special requests: Populate `select-reservation` dropdown with reservation IDs.  ---  # End of CarRental Design Specification
================================================================================


=== LLM_call: IntegrationMerger ===
INPUT: === app.py ===
from flask import Flask, request, jsonify, render_template, abort
from datetime import datetime
import os

app = Flask(__name__)
DATA_DIR = 'data'

# Utility functions for file paths
def get_file_path(filename):
    return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)

# Parsing and writing functions for each data file

def load_vehicles():
    vehicles = []
    try:
        with open(get_file_path('vehicles.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    vehicle = {
                        'vehicle_id': int(parts[0]),
                        'make': parts[1],
                        'model': parts[2],
                        'vehicle_type': parts[3],
                        'daily_rate': float(parts[4]),
                        'seats': int(parts[5]),
                        'transmission': parts[6],
                        'fuel_type': parts[7],
                        'status': parts[8]
                    }
                    vehicles.append(vehicle)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        pass
    return vehicles

def save_vehicles(vehicles):
    with open(get_file_path('vehicles.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for v in vehicles:
            line = f"{v['vehicle_id']}|{v['make']}|{v['model']}|{v['vehicle_type']}|{v['daily_rate']:.2f}|{v['seats']}|{v['transmission']}|{v['fuel_type']}|{v['status']}"
            f.write(line + '\n')


def load_customers():
    customers = []
    try:
        with open(get_file_path('customers.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    customer = {
                        'customer_id': int(parts[0]),
                        'name': parts[1],
                        'email': parts[2],
                        'phone': parts[3],
                        'driver_license': parts[4],
                        'license_expiry': parts[5]
                    }
                    customers.append(customer)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        pass
    return customers


def save_customers(customers):
    with open(get_file_path('customers.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for c in customers:
            line = f"{c['customer_id']}|{c['name']}|{c['email']}|{c['phone']}|{c['driver_license']}|{c['license_expiry']}"
            f.write(line + '\n')


def load_locations():
    locations = []
    try:
        with open(get_file_path('locations.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    location = {
                        'location_id': int(parts[0]),
                        'city': parts[1],
                        'address': parts[2],
                        'phone': parts[3],
                        'hours': parts[4],
                        'available_vehicles': int(parts[5])
                    }
                    locations.append(location)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        pass
    return locations


def save_locations(locations):
    with open(get_file_path('locations.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for loc in locations:
            line = f"{loc['location_id']}|{loc['city']}|{loc['address']}|{loc['phone']}|{loc['hours']}|{loc['available_vehicles']}"
            f.write(line + '\n')


def load_rentals():
    rentals = []
    try:
        with open(get_file_path('rentals.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    rental = {
                        'rental_id': int(parts[0]),
                        'vehicle_id': int(parts[1]),
                        'customer_id': int(parts[2]),
                        'pickup_date': parts[3],
                        'dropoff_date': parts[4],
                        'pickup_location': parts[5],
                        'dropoff_location': parts[6],
                        'total_price': float(parts[7]),
                        'status': parts[8]
                    }
                    rentals.append(rental)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        pass
    return rentals


def save_rentals(rentals):
    with open(get_file_path('rentals.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for r in rentals:
            line = f"{r['rental_id']}|{r['vehicle_id']}|{r['customer_id']}|{r['pickup_date']}|{r['dropoff_date']}|{r['pickup_location']}|{r['dropoff_location']}|{r['total_price']:.2f}|{r['status']}"
            f.write(line + '\n')


def load_insurance():
    insurance_plans = []
    try:
        with open(get_file_path('insurance.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    plan = {
                        'insurance_id': int(parts[0]),
                        'plan_name': parts[1],
                        'description': parts[2],
                        'daily_cost': float(parts[3]),
                        'coverage_limit': parts[4],
                        'deductible': float(parts[5])
                    }
                    insurance_plans.append(plan)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        pass
    return insurance_plans


def save_insurance(plans):
    with open(get_file_path('insurance.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for p in plans:
            line = f"{p['insurance_id']}|{p['plan_name']}|{p['description']}|{p['daily_cost']:.2f}|{p['coverage_limit']}|{p['deductible']:.2f}"
            f.write(line + '\n')


def load_reservations():
    reservations = []
    try:
        with open(get_file_path('reservations.txt'), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    reservation = {
                        'reservation_id': int(parts[0]),
                        'rental_id': int(parts[1]),
                        'vehicle_id': int(parts[2]),
                        'customer_id': int(parts[3]),
                        'status': parts[4],
                        'insurance_id': int(parts[5]),
                        'special_requests': parts[6] if len(parts) > 6 else ''
                    }
                    reservations.append(reservation)
    except FileNotFoundError:
        pass
    return reservations


def save_reservations(reservations):
    with open(get_file_path('reservations.txt'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        for res in reservations:
            line = f"{res['reservation_id']}|{res['rental_id']}|{res['vehicle_id']}|{res['customer_id']}|{res['status']}|{res['insurance_id']}|{res['special_requests']}"
            f.write(line + '\n')

# Helper date functions

def parse_date(date_str):
    try:
        return datetime.strptime(date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()
    except Exception:
        return None

def date_ranges_overlap(start1, end1, start2, end2):
    return start1 <= end2 and start2 <= end1

# ROUTES IMPLEMENTATION

# 1. Dashboard Page
@app.route('/dashboard')
def dashboard():
    vehicles = load_vehicles()
    featured_vehicles = [v for v in vehicles if v['status'].lower() == 'available']
    promotions = [
        "Save 10% on SUVs this weekend!",
        "Book for 7+ days and get 1 day free!",
        "Free GPS on luxury vehicle rentals"
    ]
    return render_template('dashboard.html', vehicles=featured_vehicles, promotions=promotions, page_title='Car Rental Dashboard')

# 2. Vehicle Search Page
@app.route('/vehicles/search', methods=['GET'])
def vehicle_search():
    location = request.args.get('location')
    vehicle_type = request.args.get('vehicle_type')
    start_date_str = request.args.get('start_date')
    end_date_str = request.args.get('end_date')

    vehicles = load_vehicles()
    rentals = load_rentals()

    # Filter available vehicles
    available_vehicles = [v for v in vehicles if v['status'].lower() == 'available']

    # Filter by location if provided
    if location:
        # We assume location filter means pickup_location availability
        # Here we filter vehicles by those which have rentals with given location or vehicles that are at that location?
        # Since vehicles.txt does not include location, we interpret location filtering by availability at that location based on rentals.
        # But without explicit vehicle-location linkage, we skip exact location filter on vehicle here.
        pass

    # Filter by vehicle_type
    if vehicle_type:
        vehicle_type_lower = vehicle_type.lower()
        available_vehicles = [v for v in available_vehicles if v['vehicle_type'].lower() == vehicle_type_lower]

    # Filter by date range
    if start_date_str and end_date_str:
        start_date = parse_date(start_date_str)
        end_date = parse_date(end_date_str)
        if not start_date or not end_date or start_date > end_date:
            return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400

        filtered_vehicles = []
        for vehicle in available_vehicles:
            vehicle_id = vehicle['vehicle_id']
            # Check if vehicle has overlapping rental
            overlapping = False
            for rental in rentals:
                if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:
                    rental_start = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])
                    rental_end = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])
                    if rental_start and rental_end and date_ranges_overlap(start_date, end_date, rental_start, rental_end):
                        overlapping = True
                        break
            if not overlapping:
                filtered_vehicles.append(vehicle)
        available_vehicles = filtered_vehicles

    return jsonify(available_vehicles)

# 3. Vehicle Details Page
@app.route('/vehicles/<int:vehicle_id>')
def vehicle_details(vehicle_id):
    vehicles = load_vehicles()
    vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)
    if not vehicle:
        abort(404, description='Vehicle not found')
    # No reviews data, so empty or static
    reviews = []
    return render_template('vehicle_details.html', vehicle=vehicle, reviews=reviews, page_title='Vehicle Details')

# 4. Booking Page
@app.route('/booking', methods=['POST'])
def booking():
    data = request.get_json()
    required_fields = ['vehicle_id', 'pickup_location', 'dropoff_location', 'pickup_date', 'dropoff_date', 'customer_id']
    if not data or not all(field in data for field in required_fields):
        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required fields'}), 400

    vehicle_id = data['vehicle_id']
    pickup_location = data['pickup_location']
    dropoff_location = data['dropoff_location']
    pickup_date = parse_date(data['pickup_date'])
    dropoff_date = parse_date(data['dropoff_date'])
    customer_id = data['customer_id']

    if not pickup_date or not dropoff_date or pickup_date > dropoff_date:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400

    # Check vehicle availability
    rentals = load_rentals()
    for rental in rentals:
        if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:
            rental_pickup = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])
            rental_dropoff = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])
            if date_ranges_overlap(pickup_date, dropoff_date, rental_pickup, rental_dropoff):
                return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available for the selected dates'}), 400

    vehicles = load_vehicles()
    vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)
    if not vehicle or vehicle['status'].lower() != 'available':
        return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available'}), 400

    # Calculate total price
    days = (dropoff_date - pickup_date).days + 1
    total_price = vehicle['daily_rate'] * days

    # Here store temporary booking? Spec only says "store temporary or return price for confirmation" -
    # We'll just return the price for confirmation in response.

    return jsonify({'total_price': round(total_price, 2)})

# 5. Insurance Options Page
@app.route('/insurance', methods=['GET'])
def insurance_options():
    insurance_plans = load_insurance()
    return render_template('insurance.html', insurance_plans=insurance_plans, page_title='Select Insurance Coverage')

# 6. Confirm Booking with Insurance
@app.route('/booking/confirm', methods=['POST'])
def booking_confirm():
    data = request.get_json()
    required_fields = ['vehicle_id', 'customer_id', 'pickup_location', 'dropoff_location', 'pickup_date', 'dropoff_date', 'insurance_id']
    if not data or not all(field in data for field in required_fields):
        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required fields'}), 400

    vehicle_id = data['vehicle_id']
    customer_id = data['customer_id']
    pickup_location = data['pickup_location']
    dropoff_location = data['dropoff_location']
    pickup_date = parse_date(data['pickup_date'])
    dropoff_date = parse_date(data['dropoff_date'])
    insurance_id = data['insurance_id']
    special_requests = data.get('special_requests', '')

    if not pickup_date or not dropoff_date or pickup_date > dropoff_date:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid date range'}), 400

    vehicles = load_vehicles()
    vehicle = next((v for v in vehicles if v['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id), None)
    if not vehicle or vehicle['status'].lower() != 'available':
        return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available'}), 400

    insurance_plans = load_insurance()
    insurance_plan = next((i for i in insurance_plans if i['insurance_id'] == insurance_id), None)
    if not insurance_plan:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Invalid insurance plan'}), 400

    rentals = load_rentals()
    for rental in rentals:
        if rental['vehicle_id'] == vehicle_id and rental['status'].lower() in ['active', 'confirmed']:
            rental_pickup = parse_date(rental['pickup_date'])
            rental_dropoff = parse_date(rental['dropoff_date'])
            if date_ranges_overlap(pickup_date, dropoff_date, rental_pickup, rental_dropoff):
                return jsonify({'error': 'Vehicle not available for the selected dates'}), 400

    # Generate new rental_id and reservation_id
    new_rental_id = 1
    new_reservation_id = 1
    if rentals:
        new_rental_id = max(r['rental_id'] for r in rentals) + 1
    reservations = load_reservations()
    if reservations:
        new_reservation_id = max(r['reservation_id'] for r in reservations) + 1

    days = (dropoff_date - pickup_date).days + 1
    total_price = vehicle['daily_rate'] * days + insurance_plan['daily_cost'] * days

    # Save new rental record
    new_rental = {
        'rental_id': new_rental_id,
        'vehicle_id': vehicle_id,
        'customer_id': customer_id,
        'pickup_date': pickup_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
        'dropoff_date': dropoff_date.strftime('%Y-%m-%d'),
        'pickup_location': pickup_location,
        'dropoff_location': dropoff_location,
        'total_price': total_price,
        'status': 'Active'
    }
    rentals.append(new_rental)
    save_rentals(rentals)

    # Save new reservation record
    new_reservation = {
        'reservation_id': new_reservation_id,
        'rental_id': new_rental_id,
        'vehicle_id': vehicle_id,
        'customer_id': customer_id,
        'status': 'Confirmed',
        'insurance_id': insurance_id,
        'special_requests': special_requests
    }
    reservations.append(new_reservation)
    save_reservations(reservations)

    return jsonify({'message': 'Booking confirmed', 'rental_id': new_rental_id, 'reservation_id': new_reservation_id, 'total_price': round(total_price, 2)})

# 7. Rental History Page
@app.route('/rentals/history', methods=['GET'])
def rental_history():
    customer_id = request.args.get('customer_id', type=int)
    status_filter = request.args.get('status', 'All').lower()

    rentals = load_rentals()
    filtered = []

    for rental in rentals:
        if customer_id and rental['customer_id'] != customer_id:
            continue
        if status_filter != 'all':
            if rental['status'].lower() != status_filter:
                continue
        filtered.append(rental)

    return render_template('rental_history.html', rentals=filtered, page_title='Rental History')

# 8. Reservation Management Page
@app.route('/reservations', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def reservations_page():
    if request.method == 'GET':
        customer_id = request.args.get('customer_id', type=int)
        reservations = load_reservations()
        if customer_id:
            reservations = [r for r in reservations if r['customer_id'] == customer_id]
        # Return current and upcoming only
        # Assuming upcoming means status not Cancelled
        reservations = [r for r in reservations if r['status'].lower() != 'cancelled']
        return render_template('reservations.html', reservations=reservations, page_title='My Reservations')
    elif request.method == 'POST':
        # Create new reservation? Spec does not detail POST to /reservations
        # We can implement basic creation if needed, but spec unclear, so reject
        return jsonify({'error': 'POST method to /reservations not supported'}), 405

@app.route('/reservations/<int:reservation_id>', methods=['PUT', 'DELETE'])
def reservation_modify_cancel(reservation_id):
    reservations = load_reservations()
    rentals = load_rentals()
    reservation = next((r for r in reservations if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id), None)
    if not reservation:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Reservation not found'}), 404

    if request.method == 'PUT':
        data = request.get_json()
        if not data:
            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing data'}), 400

        # Update details or cancel
        # Allow changing status or special_requests
        status = data.get('status')
        special_requests = data.get('special_requests')

        if status:
            reservation['status'] = status
        if special_requests is not None:
            reservation['special_requests'] = special_requests

        # Save back
        save_reservations(reservations)
        return jsonify({'message': 'Reservation updated'})

    elif request.method == 'DELETE':
        # Cancel reservation and associated rental
        reservation['status'] = 'Cancelled'
        rental = next((r for r in rentals if r['rental_id'] == reservation['rental_id']), None)
        if rental:
            rental['status'] = 'Cancelled'
        save_reservations(reservations)
        save_rentals(rentals)
        return jsonify({'message': 'Reservation and rental cancelled'})

# 9. Special Requests Page
@app.route('/reservations/<int:reservation_id>/special_requests', methods=['POST'])
def special_requests(reservation_id):
    data = request.get_json()
    if not data:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Missing request data'}), 400

    driver_assistance = data.get('driver_assistance', False)
    gps = data.get('gps', False)
    child_seat_quantity = data.get('child_seat_quantity', 0)
    special_notes = data.get('special_notes', '')

    reservations = load_reservations()
    reservation = next((r for r in reservations if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id), None)
    if not reservation:
        return jsonify({'error': 'Reservation not found'}), 404

    # Compose new special_requests string
    parts = []
    if driver_assistance:
        parts.append('Driver assistance requested')
    if gps:
        parts.append('GPS requested')
    if child_seat_quantity and int(child_seat_quantity) > 0:
        parts.append(f'Child seat(s) quantity: {int(child_seat_quantity)}')
    if special_notes:
        parts.append(f'Notes: {special_notes}')

    reservation['special_requests'] = '; '.join(parts)
    save_reservations(reservations)

    return jsonify({'message': 'Special requests updated'})

# 10. Locations Page
@app.route('/locations', methods=['GET'])
def locations_page():
    hours_filter = request.args.get('hours')
    search = request.args.get('search')

    locations = load_locations()

    filtered = locations

    if hours_filter:
        # Possible hours_filter values: exact match or partial match
        filtered = [loc for loc in filtered if hours_filter in loc['hours']]

    if search:
        search_lower = search.lower()
        filtered = [loc for loc in filtered if search_lower in loc['city'].lower() or search_lower in loc['address'].lower()]

    return render_template('locations.html', locations=filtered, page_title='Pickup and Dropoff Locations')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)


=== design_spec.md ===
# CarRental Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Backend Routes and Data Schemas

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Route:** `/dashboard`
- **Methods:** GET
- **Description:** Fetch featured vehicles (status="Available") from `vehicles.txt` and display current promotions.
- **Request Parameters:** None

---

### 2. Vehicle Search Page
- **Route:** `/vehicles/search`
- **Methods:** GET
- **Query Parameters:** 
  - `location` (optional)
  - `vehicle_type` (optional)
  - `start_date` (optional)
  - `end_date` (optional)
- **Description:** Load available vehicles from `vehicles.txt` (status="Available"), filter by vehicle type and location, filter based on rental date range by checking overlapping bookings in `rentals.txt`.
- **Response:** Filtered vehicle data.

---

### 3. Vehicle Details Page
- **Route:** `/vehicles/<int:vehicle_id>`
- **Methods:** GET
- **Description:** Retrieve vehicle details by `vehicle_id` from `vehicles.txt` including specs (make, model, seats, transmission, fuel type, daily rate). Reviews section can be static or empty.

---

### 4. Booking Page
- **Route:** `/booking`
- **Methods:** POST
- **Request Body (JSON):**
  - `vehicle_id` (int)
  - `pickup_location` (str)
  - `dropoff_location` (str)
  - `pickup_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)
  - `dropoff_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)
  - `customer_id` (int)
- **Business Logic:** Validate vehicle availability from `rentals.txt` within date range, calculate total price (daily_rate * number of days), store temporary booking or return price for confirmation.

---

### 5. Insurance Options Page
- **Route:** `/insurance`
- **Methods:** GET
- **Description:** Fetch insurance plans from `insurance.txt`. Return plan details: name, description, daily cost, coverage limit, deductible.

---

### 6. Confirm Booking with Insurance
- **Route:** `/booking/confirm`
- **Methods:** POST
- **Request Body (JSON):**
  - `vehicle_id` (int)
  - `customer_id` (int)
  - `pickup_location` (str)
  - `dropoff_location` (str)
  - `pickup_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)
  - `dropoff_date` (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)
  - `insurance_id` (int)
  - `special_requests` (str, optional)
- **Business Logic:** Generate new `rental_id` and `reservation_id` by incrementing max existing IDs. Calculate total price as vehicle daily_rate * days + insurance daily_cost * days. Save new rental record with "Active" status to `rentals.txt`. Save reservation including special requests to `reservations.txt`.

---

### 7. Rental History Page
- **Route:** `/rentals/history`
- **Methods:** GET
- **Query Parameters:**
  - `customer_id` (optional)
  - `status` (optional; values: All, Active, Completed, Cancelled)
- **Description:** Load `rentals.txt` filtered by customer and status. Return rental history list.

---

### 8. Reservation Management Page
- **Route:** `/reservations`
- **Methods:** GET, POST, PUT, DELETE
- **GET:**
  - Query Parameter: `customer_id` (optional)
  - Returns current and upcoming reservations from `reservations.txt`, filtered if customer provided.
- **PUT:** `/reservations/<int:reservation_id>`
  - Modify reservation details or cancel; update in `reservations.txt`.
- **DELETE:** `/reservations/<int:reservation_id>`
  - Cancel reservation; update statuses to "Cancelled" in both reservations and rentals files.

---

### 9. Special Requests Page
- **Route:** `/reservations/<int:reservation_id>/special_requests`
- **Methods:** POST
- **Request Body (JSON):** Contains special request fields: driver assistance, GPS, child seat quantity, special notes.
- **Description:** Append or update `special_requests` field in `reservations.txt` for the reservation.

---

### 10. Locations Page
- **Route:** `/locations`
- **Methods:** GET
- **Query Parameters:**
  - `hours` (optional)
  - `search` (optional)
- **Description:** Load locations from `locations.txt`, filter by operating hours and search by city or name. Return location list.

---

## Section 2: Data File Schemas and Formats

### 1. vehicles.txt
- **Fields:** vehicle_id (int), make (str), model (str), vehicle_type (str), daily_rate (float), seats (int), transmission (str), fuel_type (str), status (str)
- **Delimiter:** `|`
- **Example:**
```
1|Toyota|Camry|Sedan|55.00|5|Automatic|Petrol|Available
2|Honda|CR-V|SUV|75.00|7|Automatic|Petrol|Available
3|BMW|X5|Luxury|150.00|5|Automatic|Diesel|Available
```

---

### 2. customers.txt
- **Fields:** customer_id (int), name (str), email (str), phone (str), driver_license (str), license_expiry (date `YYYY-MM-DD`)
- **Delimiter:** `|`
- **Example:**
```
1|Alice Johnson|alice@example.com|555-0101|D1234567|2026-06-15
2|Bob Williams|bob@example.com|555-0102|D2345678|2027-03-20
```

---

### 3. locations.txt
- **Fields:** location_id (int), city (str), address (str), phone (str), hours (str), available_vehicles (int)
- **Delimiter:** `|`
- **Example:**
```
1|New York|123 Main St, NYC|555-1000|24/7|12
2|Los Angeles|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-2000|09:00-18:00|8
```

---

### 4. rentals.txt
- **Fields:** rental_id (int), vehicle_id (int), customer_id (int), pickup_date (date `YYYY-MM-DD`), dropoff_date (date `YYYY-MM-DD`), pickup_location (str), dropoff_location (str), total_price (float), status (str)
- **Delimiter:** `|`
- **Example:**
```
1|1|1|2025-02-01|2025-02-05|New York|Los Angeles|275.00|Completed
2|2|2|2025-02-10|2025-02-12|Los Angeles|New York|150.00|Active
```

---

### 5. insurance.txt
- **Fields:** insurance_id (int), plan_name (str), description (str), daily_cost (float), coverage_limit (str or float), deductible (float)
- **Delimiter:** `|`
- **Example:**
```
1|Basic Coverage|Liability only, min coverage|5.00|50000|1000
2|Standard Coverage|Collision and theft protection|12.00|250000|500
3|Premium Coverage|Full comprehensive protection|18.00|Unlimited|0
```

---

### 6. reservations.txt
- **Fields:** reservation_id (int), rental_id (int), vehicle_id (int), customer_id (int), status (str), insurance_id (int), special_requests (str)
- **Delimiter:** `|`
- **Example:**
```
1|1|1|1|Confirmed|2|Driver assistance requested
2|2|2|2|Active|1|GPS and child seat needed
```

---

## Section 3: Frontend Templates and Navigation

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Template Filename:** dashboard.html
- **Page Title:** Car Rental Dashboard
- **Elements:**
  - `dashboard-page` (Div): Main container
  - `featured-vehicles` (Div): Featured vehicle recommendations display
  - `search-vehicles-button` (Button): Navigate to Vehicle Search page
  - `my-reservations-button` (Button): Navigate to Reservations page
  - `promotions-section` (Div): Current promotions display

---

### 2. Vehicle Search Page
- **Template Filename:** vehicle_search.html
- **Page Title:** Search Vehicles
- **Elements:**
  - `search-page` (Div): Main container
  - `location-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by pickup location
  - `vehicle-type-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by vehicle type [Economy, Compact, Sedan, SUV, Luxury]
  - `date-range-input` (Input): Rental date range input
  - `vehicles-grid` (Div): Grid displaying vehicle cards
    - Each vehicle card includes:
      - Vehicle image (img tag, Jinja for loop used, no fixed id)
      - Model and price per day
      - `view-details-button-{vehicle_id}` (Button): View vehicle details

---

### 3. Vehicle Details Page
- **Template Filename:** vehicle_details.html
- **Page Title:** Vehicle Details
- **Elements:**
  - `vehicle-details-page` (Div): Container for details page
  - `vehicle-name` (H1): Vehicle make and model display
  - `vehicle-specs` (Div): Vehicle specifications (engine, seats, transmission)
  - `daily-rate` (Div): Daily rental rate
  - `book-now-button` (Button): Initiate booking process
  - `vehicle-reviews` (Div): Customer reviews section

---

### 4. Booking Page
- **Template Filename:** booking.html
- **Page Title:** Book Your Rental
- **Elements:**
  - `booking-page` (Div): Container
  - `pickup-location` (Dropdown): Pickup location selection
  - `dropoff-location` (Dropdown): Dropoff location selection
  - `pickup-date` (Input): Pickup date selector
  - `dropoff-date` (Input): Dropoff date selector
  - `calculate-price-button` (Button): Compute total rental price
  - `total-price` (Div): Display total price
  - `proceed-to-insurance-button` (Button): Proceed to Insurance Options page

---

### 5. Insurance Options Page
- **Template Filename:** insurance.html
- **Page Title:** Select Insurance Coverage
- **Elements:**
  - `insurance-page` (Div): Container
  - `insurance-options` (Div): Insurance plans display
    - Each plan includes:
      - `select-insurance-{insurance_id}` (Radio): Select insurance radio button
  - `insurance-description` (Div): Description of selected plan
  - `insurance-price` (Div): Price of selected insurance
  - `confirm-booking-button` (Button): Confirm booking with insurance

---

### 6. Rental History Page
- **Template Filename:** rental_history.html
- **Page Title:** Rental History
- **Elements:**
  - `history-page` (Div): Container
  - `rentals-table` (Table): Rental details table (ID, vehicle, dates, location, status)
  - `view-rental-details-{rental_id}` (Button): View rental details
  - `status-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by rental status
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate to Dashboard page

---

### 7. Reservation Management Page
- **Template Filename:** reservations.html
- **Page Title:** My Reservations
- **Elements:**
  - `reservations-page` (Div): Container
  - `reservations-list` (Div): List of reservations
    - Each reservation item includes:
      - `modify-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (Button): Modify reservation
      - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (Button): Cancel reservation
  - `sort-by-date-button` (Button): Sort reservations
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate to Dashboard

---

### 8. Special Requests Page
- **Template Filename:** special_requests.html
- **Page Title:** Special Requests
- **Elements:**
  - `requests-page` (Div): Container
  - `select-reservation` (Dropdown): Select reservation for requests
  - `driver-assistance-checkbox` (Checkbox): Driver assistance request
  - `gps-option-checkbox` (Checkbox): GPS option
  - `child-seat-quantity` (Input): Number of child seats
  - `special-notes` (Textarea): Additional notes
  - `submit-requests-button` (Button): Submit requests

---

### 9. Locations Page
- **Template Filename:** locations.html
- **Page Title:** Pickup and Dropoff Locations
- **Elements:**
  - `locations-page` (Div): Container
  - `locations-list` (Div): List of locations
    - Each location item has:
      - `location-detail-button-{location_id}` (Button): View location details
  - `hours-filter` (Dropdown): Filter by operating hours
  - `search-location-input` (Input): Search by city or name
  - `back-to-dashboard` (Button): Navigate to Dashboard

---

## Section 4: Navigation and Interaction

### Navigation Flows
- Dashboard page buttons:
  - `search-vehicles-button` -> Vehicle Search Page
  - `my-reservations-button` -> Reservations Page
  - `back-to-dashboard` (where present) -> Dashboard Page
- Vehicle Search:
  - `view-details-button-{vehicle_id}` -> Vehicle Details Page
- Vehicle Details:
  - `book-now-button` -> Booking Page with vehicle context
- Booking:
  - `calculate-price-button` -> Compute and show price
  - `proceed-to-insurance-button` -> Insurance Options Page
- Insurance Options:
  - `confirm-booking-button` -> Confirm booking and navigate to Rental History or Reservations
- Rental History:
  - `view-rental-details-{rental_id}` -> Show rental details
  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard
- Reservations:
  - `modify-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` -> Modify reservation
  - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` -> Cancel reservation
  - `sort-by-date-button` -> Sort reservations
  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard
- Special Requests:
  - `submit-requests-button` -> Submit and confirm requests
- Locations:
  - `location-detail-button-{location_id}` -> Show location details
  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard

---

### Dynamic Data Placeholders (Jinja2 Variable Usage)
- Vehicles lists: `{% for vehicle in vehicles %}`, vehicle attributes via `vehicle.id`, `vehicle.make`, `vehicle.model`, `vehicle.daily_rate`.
- Locations: `{% for location in locations %}`
- Reservations and Rentals: `{% for reservation in reservations %}` or `{% for rental in rentals %}`
- Insurance options: `{% for plan in insurance_plans %}`
- Special requests: Populate `select-reservation` dropdown with reservation IDs.

---

paths def get_file_path(filename):     return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)  # Parsing and writing functions for each data file  def load_vehicles():     vehicles = []     try:         with
